intro: The chequered flag awaits, as iFormula League descends on Red Bull Ring's Grand Prix. Thrill seekers ready to race, the track ablaze under the sun's rays. HEAT 1, starting at fifteen-hundred-and-one-eight, will determine this day's fate! Get ready for an epic race!

lap 2 - Carlos Navarro2 looses several positions: off track

Silas Krag-Vrolijk slips back, and Mackenzie Rune takes advantage with a smart overtake! Vytautas Jasiulevicius is on the move, taking position 12 from Victor Solano. Randolph Smith follows suit and rallies to 13th. Carlos Navarro2 spins off the track, turning a promising start into a costly error. Victor Solano regains the lead with an incredible overtake of Randolph Smith. Darius Rackauskas pulls off another stunning overtake, racing past Kévin Viémont for the 7th spot. Kev Viémont retaliates with a spectacular overtake of his own, taking the 6th position from Darius Rackauskas. Unfortunately Carlos Navarro2's joyride ends in disaster as he spins off again.
